name: Basil Broccoli Terrine
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine broccoli and water in a heavy saucepan. Bring to a boil.
2. Cover, reduce heat to medium, and cook for 10 minutes or until tender. Drain and rinse under cold water. Drain again.
3. Transfer broccoli to a food processor with egg whites, yolks, grated Parmesan, lemon juice, dried basil, salt, and pepper. Process for 3 minutes or until smooth.
4. Line a 7 1/2 x 3 x 2 inch loaf pan with foil, extending it 3 inches beyond the sides of the pan.
5. Coat foil with cooking spray.
6. Pour broccoli mixture into prepared pan. Loosely cover with foil.
7. Place loaf pan in a 12 x 8 x 2 inch baking dish and pour hot water into the dish to a depth of 1 inch.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until edges are firm and center is set.
9. Remove loaf pan from water and let cool on a wire rack for 15 minutes.
10. Loosen edges of terrine with a sharp knife, invert onto a serving platter, and chill.
11. Cut terrine into 16 slices. Arrange 2 slices on each of 8 individual serving plates. Garnish with cherry tomato halves and fresh basil leaves.
(Fat: 3.2; Chol: 137.)
